added.description: Added base64Url getter to SecureRandom for URL-safe encoding
Added auto-format job to CI workflow and updated config

changed.description: Raised Key.stretch (PBKDF2) default iterations from 100 to 600,000 per OWASP recommendations

deprecated.description: Deprecated insecure AES ECB mode that leaks plaintext patterns

fixed.description: Validated AES key lengths (16/24/32 bytes) and IV lengths (12 bytes for GCM, 16 for others) to prevent misuse

security.description: Implemented constant-time XOR-accumulation comparison for Fernet HMAC verification to fix timing side-channel attacks
Used constant-time XOR comparison for equal-length RSA signature verification to fix timing side-channel attacks
